text.title: Cross Role Handoff Protocol — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have ≥4 roles, ≥1 handoff failure last quarter, a named PM, and a sign-off mechanism?

branch.when: roles_count >= 4 AND handoff_failures_last_quarter >= 1 AND named_pm == true AND sign_off_present == true
branch.conclusion: Adopt the protocol: DoR + artifact list + sign-off per transition.
Block. Establish a sign-off mechanism first; protocol without sign-off is decoration.
Skip. Pair-level checklist is cheaper at this scale.
